Fetch.Script: SELECT job_config_id, job_name, job_type, enabled, trigger_type, cron_expression, interval_seconds, start_at, end_at, parameters, created_at, updated_at,TargetType,TargetMethod,Args,orgid FROM scheduler.job_config where enabled  = true
SELECT premiucollid, orgid, policyref, premium_received_dt, premium_type, premium_amt FROM insu_core.premium_collected WHERE orgId= @orgId
